title: Umami Rich Thai Chicken Stir-fry
description: An indulgent and dense Thai dish featuring chicken bouillon powder, simmered with vegetables for a rich and savory flavor profile.

ingredients.name: soy sauce
ingredients.notes: Light soy for a milder taste

ingredients.name: lime leaves (optional)
ingredients.notes: For added freshness and umami flavor

ingredients.name: garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: Minced for the aroma and depth of flavor

instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add chicken strips, soy sauce, chicken bouillon powder, and lime leaves (if using). Stir-fry until chicken is cooked through, about 5 minutes.
Add red bell pepper and green onions. Continue to stir-fry for another minute.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
